2150890.name: Fungal Front
2150890.description:
A Real-Time Strategy game set on Mycopia, a fungal planet with boundless resources, protected by the Shroomies.

The year is 2062.

Warp speed space travel has been possible for almost two decades, but humanity faces bigger problems.

After years of over-prescription, antibiotics have become entirely ineffective at treating even the smallest of illnesses. The top scientists of the world have been searching far and wide for a cure for a new superbug.

In a desperate attempt to save humanity, space explorers have been taking samples from planets in other solar systems, hoping to find a cure.

After years of searching the endless void of space and with little hope left for humanity, Mycopia is discovered.

Home to the Shroomies, a fungal species that zealously fight for the safety of their Queen, it is also rich in immune-boosting mycelic serum.

You will command the Human space mission on Mycopia to extract the serum and bring it back to earth to begin formulating a cure.
2150890.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
